title: Scaredy-Kat
description: Everything is scary when you’re Scaredy-Kat and always getting into spooky situations!
altHero: Scaredy-Kat, an orange cat, screaming with his eyes bulging and tongue sticking out
alt1: Scaredy-Kat screaming as he holds a lit bomb
alt2: Scaredy-Kat strapped to an exam table
alt3: Scaredy-Kat opening a door and a huge ghost is on the other side
alt4: Scaredy-Kat opening a coffin and screaming, his brain jumping out of his head
